Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS-
DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. "CAUSING DOCUMENTS TO BE PLACED IN MAIL OR SERVED BY FEDERAL EXPRESS DOES NOT COMPLY WITH REQUIREMENTS OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1013(A). FURTHERMORE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY SHOW SERVICE TO PLAINTIFF'S AUSTRALIA ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF'S SAN FRANCISCO ADDRESS APPEARS ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558
